transcript: I traced the call through the IMF network, and this is what came up. The call to Davian came from Brassel's office. It's Brassel. I think he's working with Davian. I think I'm being set up.  Oh, my God! HØRT! HØRT! HØRT! HØRT! HØRT! HØRT! HØRT! HØRT! HØRT! HØRT! HØRT! HØRT! HØRT! HØRT! Storbritannia Thanks for watching!
